mnemonics: CREATE Constraints are like Asserting Rules
CHECK Constraints are like Action Triggers
keyPoints: Constraints ensure data integrity by asserting rules on data entered.
Constraints can trigger actions when a certain condition is met.
Constraints can be defined using the CHECK constraint and the ACTION keyword.
The CHECK constraint is used to specify a condition that must be met.
The ACTION keyword is used to specify an action to be taken when a constraint is violated.
